title: convolvulus farinosus
intro: Convolvulus farinosus, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Convolvulus farinosus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. Convolvulus farinosus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
